# Musaium

> Musaium is a free AI-powered museum assistant mobile app. Visitors photograph artworks or ask questions and receive instant historical, artistic, and cultural context via AI. Available on iOS and Android.

Musaium uses computer vision to identify artworks and a LangChain-based AI pipeline enriched by Wikidata to provide accurate, sourced cultural information. The app supports French and English.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://musaium.com/en): Landing page with app features, how it works, and download links
- [Support & FAQ](https://musaium.com/en/support): Frequently asked questions and contact form
- [Privacy Policy](https://musaium.com/en/privacy): Data protection and privacy practices

## App Details

- Name: Musaium
- Developer: InnovMind
- Price: Free
- Platforms: iOS 16+, Android 10+
- Languages: French, English
- Category: Travel / Museum / Education
- Key Features: AI artwork recognition, contextual art history chat, multilingual, offline history, nearby museum map with geolocation

## FAQ

- Is the app free? Yes, Musaium is completely free.
- Which museums are compatible? Musaium works in all museums. The AI recognizes artworks through computer vision and enriches responses via Wikidata.
- Is my data protected? Yes. Photos are never shared. See the privacy policy for full details.
- How to contact support? Use the contact form on the support page.
